title: Apple's Biggest AI Test Arrives June 8. Here's What's Really at Stake at WWDC.
sentences: Apple's Biggest AI Test Arrives June 8.
Here's What's Really at Stake at WWDC.
Apple will likely (finally) reveal its AI-powered Siri this month at its flagship software event.
